description: Tenant-10 (RCM) onboarded from the OFFICIAL spec package (74 risks / 155 controls / 53 KPIs / 145 alert rules / 178 fields / 25 agents). First HIPAA-regulated tenant. Domain model from the data dictionary (PHI-flagged); risk register enforced as a dynamic-{domain}-riskType KPI; a field-expressible control subset as executable rules; full control/KPI/alert/risk catalogs + PHI inventory carried as traceability knowledge assets; 25 advisory-only agents. Supersedes the earlier representative ai-tenant10-rcm 1.0.0. NOTE: OI-01 (HIPAA field-encryption / audit substrate / per-tenant RegulatedDataProfile) is a platform GATE for Phase-1 PHI DATA handling - this package is domain METADATA and does not itself store PHI. Does NOT re-declare RecordReceived; declares its own for standalone activation.

rules.name: Minimum-necessary cross-client access
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (PrivacyOfficer). A biller may not read another client practice's PHI.
rules.reasonTemplate: RCM-CMP-011: PHI access denied - minimum-necessary rule; staff may only access their assigned client's patients (PrivacyOfficer).

rules.name: Access after termination
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (SecurityOfficer). PHI access after an employee's termination date is denied.
rules.reasonTemplate: T10-ALR-A1-02: PHI access denied - the user is terminated (SecurityOfficer).

rules.name: Privileged access without MFA
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (SecurityOfficer). Deny privileged/PHI access without MFA.
rules.reasonTemplate: RCM-CMP-006: PHI access denied - MFA is not enabled on the account (SecurityOfficer).

rules.name: OIG exclusion screening
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (ComplianceManager). Block work assignment for an OIG-excluded person/vendor.
rules.reasonTemplate: RCM-CMP-020: assignment blocked - the individual/vendor is on a federal exclusion list (ComplianceManager).

rules.name: Block on stale critical data
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Technology). Block billing/posting on stale source data.
rules.reasonTemplate: RCM-EHR-006: billing/posting held - source data is stale (Technology).

rules.name: Payer filing limit
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (ContractManager). Reject a claim past the payer filing limit.
rules.reasonTemplate: RCM-CLM-003: claim rejected - past the payer filing limit (ContractManager).

rules.name: AI execution boundary
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Governance). Agents are advisory-only; deny material actions.
rules.reasonTemplate: T10-AI-BOUNDARY: denied - RCM agents are advisory-only and may not take material actions (Governance).

knowledgeAssets.title: Tenant-10 RCM Risk Register (74 risks, 12 domains)
knowledgeAssets.summary: The full RCM risk register. RiskScore = SeverityValue x Likelihood. Enforced live as the t10-risk-index KPI over T10RiskAssessment records, riskType from {domain}.
knowledgeAssets.contentText: T10-RSK-A1 [RCM-CMP] PHI breach or unauthorized disclosure - Critical (score 12). T10-RSK-A2 [RCM-CMP] HIPAA Security Rule non-compliance - High (score 9). T10-RSK-A3 [RCM-CMP] Business Associate Agreement gaps - Critical (score 12). T10-RSK-A4 [RCM-CMP] Minimum necessary access violation - High (score 9). T10-RSK-A5 [RCM-CMP] Use of excluded or sanctioned individuals or entities - High (score 6). T10-RSK-A6 [RCM-CMP] Improper claim submission or false-claim exposure - High (score 9). T10-RSK-A7 [RCM-CMP] Data retention and record availability failure - Medium (score 6). T10-RSK-B1 [RCM-CLM] Claims not entered on time - High (score 12). T10-RSK-B2 [RCM-CLM] Timely filing deadline missed - Critical (score 12). T10-RSK-B3 [RCM-CLM] Incorrect ICD/CPT/HCPCS coding - Critical (score 12). T10-RSK-B4 [RCM-CLM] Biller data-entry errors - High (score 12). T10-RSK-B5 [RCM-CLM] Incomplete documentation before claim submission - High (score 9). knowledgeAssets.title: Tenant-10 RCM KPI Catalog (53 KPIs, 8 groups)
knowledgeAssets.summary: The 53 RCM KPIs with formulas, targets, and grains. Formulas are SQL-grain aggregations (not payload expressions), so carried here as the catalog rather than fake-computed; each maps to configurable targets.
knowledgeAssets.contentText: T10-KPI-RCM-01 [RevenueCycle] Encounter-to-charge lag: AVG(charge_entry_date - encounter_receipt_date) in business days (target 2 business_days, Lower). T10-KPI-RCM-02 [RevenueCycle] Claim submission lag: AVG(claim_submission_date - charge_entry_date) in business days (target 2 business_days, Lower). T10-KPI-RCM-03 [RevenueCycle] Clean claim rate: COUNT(claims passing all edits first pass) / COUNT(claims submitted) * 100 (target 95 percent, Higher). T10-KPI-RCM-04 [RevenueCycle] Rejection rate: COUNT(claims rejected pre-adjudication) / COUNT(claims submitted) * 100 (target 5 percent, Lower). T10-KPI-RCM-05 [RevenueCycle] Denial rate: COUNT(claim lines denied) / COUNT(claim lines adjudicated) * 100 (target 7 percent, Lower). T10-KPI-RCM-06 [RevenueCycle] AR over 30/60/90/120 days: SUM(AR balance in bucket) / SUM(total AR) * 100 per aging bucket (target 15 percent, Lower). T10-KPI-RCM-07 [RevenueCycle] No-touch claims: COUNT(open claims with no action within followup SLA) and SUM(their value) (target 0 count_and_amount, Lower). T10-KPI-RCM-08 [RevenueCycle] Appeal deadline risk: COUNT(open denials with days_to_appeal_deadline <= notice threshold) (target 0 claims, Lower). T10-KPI-RCM-09 [RevenueCycle] Underpayment variance: SUM(expected_allowed - paid_amount) where positive beyond tolerance (target 0 USD, Lower). T10-KPI-RCM-10 [RevenueCycle] Unapplied cash: SUM(unapplied cash ledger balance) (target 0 USD, Lower). T10-KPI-QUA-01 [CodingBillingQuality] Coder accuracy percentage: COUNT(QA-passed coded claims) / COUNT(QA-sampled coded claims) * 100 (target 95 percent, Higher). T10-KPI-QUA-02 [CodingBillingQuality] Biller entry accuracy percentage: COUNT(QA-passed entered claims) / COUNT(QA-sampled entered claims) * 100 (target 97 percent, Higher). T10-KPI-QUA-03 [CodingBillingQuality] Claims corrected after QA: COUNT(claims corrected following QA finding) (target 0 claims, Lower). T10-KPI-QUA-04 [CodingBillingQuality] Errors by category: COUNT(errors) grouped by error_category (target 0 errors, Lower). T10-KPI-QUA-05 [CodingBillingQuality] Denials by coder, biller, provider or payer: COUNT(denials) grouped by attribution dimension (target 0 denials, Lower). T10-KPI-QUA-06 [CodingBillingQuality] High-risk code usage: COUNT(claims with high-risk codes) / COUNT(claims) * 100 (target 5 percent, Lower). T10-KPI-QUA-07 [CodingBillingQuality] Modifier error rate: COUNT(claims with modifier errors) / COUNT(claims with modifiers) * 100 (target 2 percent, Lower). T10-KPI-ERA-01 [PaymentPosting] ERA receipt success rate: COUNT(ERA files received) / COUNT(ERA files expected) * 100 (target 99 percent, Higher). T10-KPI-ERA-02 [PaymentPosting] ERA import failure rate: COUNT(failed 835 imports) / COUNT(import attempts) * 100 (target 1 percent, Lower). T10-KPI-ERA-03 [PaymentPosting] EOB posting lag: AVG(posting_date - eob_receipt_date) in business days (target 3 business_days, Lower). T10-KPI-ERA-04 [PaymentPosting] Payment posting accuracy: COUNT(postings matching remit within tolerance) / COUNT(postings) * 100 (target 99 percent, Higher). T10-KPI-ERA-05 [PaymentPosting] Bank-to-ERA reconciliation variance: ABS(SUM(bank deposits) - SUM(posted remits)) for the period (target 0 USD, Lower). T10-KPI-ERA-06 [PaymentPosting] Credit balance aging: SUM(credit balances) bucketed by age in days (target 0 USD, Lower). T10-KPI-ELG-01 [Eligibility] Eligibility success rate: COUNT(successful 270/271 transactions) / COUNT(attempts) * 100 (target 95 percent, Higher). T10-KPI-ELG-02 [Eligibility] Visits without verified eligibility: COUNT(scheduled visits without verified eligibility) (target 0 visits, Lower). T10-KPI-ELG-03 [Eligibility] Inactive coverage detection: COUNT(visits where eligibility returned inactive or terminated coverage) (target 0 visits, Higher). T10-KPI-ELG-04 [Eligibility] Deductible exposure: SUM(estimated patient responsibility from deductible remaining) (target 0 USD, Lower). T10-KPI-ELG-05 [Eligibility] Patient AR aging: SUM(patient AR) bucketed by age in days (target 0 USD, Lower). T10-KPI-CRD-01 [Credentialing] Applications pending by payer or provider: COUNT(credentialing applications in pending status) (target 0 applications, Lower). T10-KPI-CRD-02 [Credentialing] Credentialing aging: AVG(current_date - application_date) for pending applications (target 60 days, Lower). T10-KPI-CRD-03 [Credentialing] Missing-document aging: AVG(current_date - document_requested_date) for outstanding documents (target 7 days, Lower). T10-KPI-CRD-04 [Credentialing] Revalidation due within 180/90/60/30 days: COUNT(enrollments with revalidation_due_date inside each notice window) (target 0 enrollments, Lower). T10-KPI-CRD-05 [Credentialing] Provider status dashboard freshness: AVG(current_date - status_last_update_date) (target 7 days, Lower). T10-KPI-SEC-01 [ComplianceSecurity] Users without MFA: COUNT(active accounts where mfa_enabled = false) (target 0 users, Lower). T10-KPI-SEC-02 [ComplianceSecurity] Dormant active accounts: COUNT(active accounts with last_login older than idle threshold) (target 0 accounts, Lower). T10-KPI-SEC-03 [ComplianceSecurity] Privileged access exceptions: COUNT(privileged accounts without current recertification or business justification) (target 0 accounts, Lower). T10-KPI-SEC-04 [ComplianceSecurity] PHI access anomalies: COUNT(PHI access events flagged anomalous by baseline rules) (target 0 events, Lower). T10-KPI-SEC-05 [ComplianceSecurity] Backup success rate: COUNT(successful backup jobs) / COUNT(scheduled backup jobs) * 100 (target 100 percent, Higher). T10-KPI-SEC-06 [ComplianceSecurity] Restore test success: COUNT(successful restore tests) / COUNT(scheduled restore tests) * 100 (target 100 percent, Higher). T10-KPI-SEC-07 [ComplianceSecurity] Vulnerability aging: AVG(current_date - vulnerability_detected_date) for open findings by severity (target 30 days, Lower). T10-KPI-SEC-08 [ComplianceSecurity] Training completion: COUNT(employees with required training complete) / COUNT(employees assigned) * 100 (target 100 percent, Higher). T10-KPI-HR-01 [HRResource] Attrition rate by role: COUNT(separations in period) / AVG(headcount in period) * 100 (target 15 percent, Lower). T10-KPI-HR-02 [HRResource] Regrettable attrition: COUNT(separations flagged regrettable) / COUNT(separations) * 100 (target 5 percent, Lower). T10-KPI-HR-03 [HRResource] Workload per employee: SUM(assigned work units) / COUNT(active employees) for the period (target 0 work_units, Balanced). T10-KPI-HR-04 [HRResource] Overtime trend: SUM(overtime hours) per employee per week, trended (target 10 hours, Lower). T10-KPI-HR-05 [HRResource] HR complaint aging: AVG(current_date - complaint_logged_date) for open complaints (target 5 days, Lower). T10-KPI-HR-06 [HRResource] Productivity by role: SUM(completed work units) / COUNT(productive hours) by role (target 0 units_per_hour, Higher). T10-KPI-HR-07 [HRResource] QA score by employee or team: AVG(QA score) over sampled work in the period (target 95 score, Higher). T10-KPI-CLT-01 [ClientSatisfaction] Complaint aging: AVG(current_date - complaint_logged_date) for open complaints (target 72 hours, Lower). T10-KPI-CLT-02 [ClientSatisfaction] SLA breach rate: COUNT(items breaching SLA) / COUNT(items in scope) * 100 (target 5 percent, Lower). T10-KPI-CLT-03 [ClientSatisfaction] Ticket reopen rate: COUNT(tickets reopened) / COUNT(tickets closed) * 100 (target 5 percent, Lower). T10-KPI-CLT-04 [ClientSatisfaction] Client invoice timeliness: COUNT(invoices generated on or before due date) / COUNT(invoices due) * 100 (target 100 percent, Higher). T10-KPI-CLT-05 [ClientSatisfaction] Client churn risk score: Weighted composite of complaint aging, SLA breach rate, AR trend and satisfaction score (target 30 score, Lower).

knowledgeAssets.title: Tenant-10 RCM Alert Rule Catalog (145 rules)
knowledgeAssets.summary: The 145 alert rules, every threshold configurable. In ECARMF these become tenant-runtime Benchmarks; carried here as the source catalog.
knowledgeAssets.contentText: T10-ALR-A1-01 [T10-RSK-A1] Bulk PHI export detected: Count of patient records exported by a single user in a rolling window exceeds threshold (default 250 records, Critical). T10-ALR-A1-02 [T10-RSK-A1] Access after termination: Authenticated PHI access event occurs after employee termination_date (default 0 hours, Critical). T10-ALR-A1-03 [T10-RSK-A1] Unencrypted PHI file detected: DLP scan identifies file containing PHI markers with encryption_status = false (default 1 files, High). T10-ALR-A2-01 [T10-RSK-A2] Security risk analysis outdated: Days since last completed HIPAA risk analysis exceeds threshold (default 365 days, High). T10-ALR-A2-02 [T10-RSK-A2] Access review overdue: Days since last completed user access review exceeds threshold (default 90 days, High). T10-ALR-A2-03 [T10-RSK-A2] Remediation item overdue: Open remediation item past due_date by more than threshold (default 7 days, Medium). T10-ALR-A3-01 [T10-RSK-A3] BAA missing for PHI-access party: Vendor, subcontractor or client with phi_access = true has no active BAA record (default 0 records, Critical). T10-ALR-A3-02 [T10-RSK-A3] BAA approaching expiry: Days until BAA expiry_date is at or below any configured notice interval (default 120;90;60;30;15;7 days, High). T10-ALR-A4-01 [T10-RSK-A4] Cross-client PHI access: User accesses patient records for a client not in their client_assignment list (default 0 events, High). T10-ALR-A4-02 [T10-RSK-A4] Abnormal record volume per user: User record-access count in a day exceeds N standard deviations above their 30-day baseline (default 3 stddev, Medium). T10-ALR-A4-03 [T10-RSK-A4] Dormant account still active: Active account with no login for more than threshold days (default 30 days, Medium). T10-ALR-A5-01 [T10-RSK-A5] OIG exclusion screening missed: Days since last completed exclusion screening run exceeds threshold (default 31 days, High). T10-ALR-A5-02 [T10-RSK-A5] Exclusion list match: Employee, contractor or vendor matches an OIG/SAM exclusion record (default 0 matches, Critical). T10-ALR-A6-01 [T10-RSK-A6] Abnormal billing pattern by provider: Provider high-risk code frequency exceeds N standard deviations above peer specialty baseline (default 2.5 stddev, High). T10-ALR-A6-02 [T10-RSK-A6] Unsupported documentation on submitted claim: Post-submission audit finds claim with documentation_status != complete (default 1 percent, High). T10-ALR-A7-01 [T10-RSK-A7] Retention deadline approaching: Days until record retention_expiry_date at or below notice interval (default 90 days, Medium). T10-ALR-A7-02 [T10-RSK-A7] Archive job failure: Consecutive failed document archive or upload jobs exceeds threshold (default 2 jobs, High). T10-ALR-B1-01 [T10-RSK-B1] Encounter not charge-entered within SLA: Business days between encounter_receipt_date and charge_entry_date exceeds SLA (default 2 business_days, High). T10-ALR-B1-02 [T10-RSK-B1] Charge-entry backlog by client: Count of un-entered encounters for a client exceeds threshold (default 50 encounters, High). T10-ALR-B1-03 [T10-RSK-B1] Claim not submitted within SLA: Business days between charge_entry_date and claim_submission_date exceeds SLA (default 2 business_days, High). T10-ALR-B2-01 [T10-RSK-B2] Timely filing deadline approaching: Days until payer filing_limit_date at or below any configured notice interval (default 90;60;30;15;7 days, Critical). T10-ALR-B2-02 [T10-RSK-B2] Timely filing deadline breached: Claim unsubmitted past payer filing_limit_date (default 0 claims, Critical). T10-ALR-B3-01 [T10-RSK-B3] Coder accuracy below threshold: Coder QA accuracy percentage over rolling window falls below threshold (default 95 percent, High). T10-ALR-B3-02 [T10-RSK-B3] Coder accuracy drop: Coder accuracy declines by more than threshold points versus prior window (default 5 points, High). T10-ALR-B3-03 [T10-RSK-B3] Payer-specific code denial spike: Denial rate for a CPT/payer combination exceeds threshold (default 10 percent, Medium). T10-ALR-B4-01 [T10-RSK-B4] Biller rejection rate above threshold: Biller front-end rejection rate over rolling window exceeds threshold (default 5 percent, High). T10-ALR-B4-02 [T10-RSK-B4] Repeated error category by biller: Same error_category recurs for a biller more than N times in a window (default 3 occurrences, Medium). T10-ALR-B5-01 [T10-RSK-B5] Claim billable but documentation incomplete: Claim in ready_to_bill status with documentation_status in (missing, unsigned, incomplete) (default 48 hours, High). T10-ALR-B6-01 [T10-RSK-B6] No follow-up within SLA: Days since last_followup_date on an open claim exceeds SLA (default 21 days, High). T10-ALR-B6-02 [T10-RSK-B6] High-value claim idle: Open claim with value at or above threshold and no action for N days (default 5000 USD, High). T10-ALR-B6-03 [T10-RSK-B6] Appeal window approaching: Days until appeal_deadline at or below any configured notice interval (default 30;15;7;3 days, Critical). T10-ALR-B7-01 [T10-RSK-B7] Productivity data feed stale: Hours since last productivity metric refresh exceeds threshold (default 24 hours, Medium). T10-ALR-B8-01 [T10-RSK-B8] Manual-error rate above threshold: Error rate on manually processed claims exceeds threshold (default 8 percent, Medium). T10-ALR-C1-01 [T10-RSK-C1] Eligibility failure rate spike: Eligibility (270/271) failure rate over rolling window exceeds threshold (default 15 percent, Critical). T10-ALR-C1-02 [T10-RSK-C1] Payer-specific eligibility down: Consecutive eligibility failures for a single payer exceeds threshold (default 10 transactions, High). T10-ALR-C1-03 [T10-RSK-C1] Appointments without verified eligibility: Count of scheduled visits within N days lacking verified eligibility exceeds threshold (default 25 visits, Critical). T10-ALR-C2-01 [T10-RSK-C2] Stale eligibility check: Days since eligibility_check_date at time of service exceeds threshold (default 30 days, Medium). T10-ALR-C2-02 [T10-RSK-C2] Inactive or terminated coverage detected: Eligibility response returns inactive/terminated status for a scheduled or billed visit (default 0 visits, High). T10-ALR-C3-01 [T10-RSK-C3] High deductible exposure without estimate: Visit with deductible_remaining at or above threshold and no patient estimate recorded (default 500 USD, Medium). T10-ALR-C4-01 [T10-RSK-C4] COB denial or unbilled secondary: Primary denied for COB reason, or primary paid and secondary not billed within SLA (default 7 days, Medium). T10-ALR-C5-01 [T10-RSK-C5] Authorization missing before service: Scheduled service requiring prior auth has no authorization_number within N days of DOS (default 3 days, High). T10-ALR-C5-02 [T10-RSK-C5] Authorization expired, exhausted or mismatched: Auth expired, visits_used >= visits_allowed, or auth CPT/provider/location mismatches the claim (default 0 claims, High). T10-ALR-D1-01 [T10-RSK-D1] Expected ERA file not received: Business days since last ERA received from a payer exceeds threshold (default 3 business_days, Critical). T10-ALR-D1-02 [T10-RSK-D1] ERA import failure: Consecutive failed 835 import jobs exceeds threshold (default 2 jobs, Critical). T10-ALR-D1-03 [T10-RSK-D1] ERA volume drop: Payer daily ERA volume falls below threshold percentage of 30-day average (default 50 percent, High). T10-ALR-D2-01 [T10-RSK-D2] EOB unposted beyond SLA: Business days between EOB receipt_date and posting_date exceeds SLA (default 5 business_days, High). T10-ALR-D2-02 [T10-RSK-D2] High-value EOB pending: Unposted EOB with payment_amount at or above threshold (default 10000 USD, High). T10-ALR-D3-01 [T10-RSK-D3] Posted amount mismatches ERA/EOB: Absolute variance between remit amount and posted amount exceeds tolerance (default 1 USD, High). T10-ALR-D3-02 [T10-RSK-D3] Abnormal write-off or manual override: Write-off or manual override above threshold, or override count per poster above threshold (default 500 USD, High). T10-ALR-D4-01 [T10-RSK-D4] Bank-to-remit reconciliation variance: Absolute variance between bank deposits and posted remits for a period exceeds tolerance (default 100 USD, High). T10-ALR-D4-02 [T10-RSK-D4] Unapplied cash above threshold: Unapplied cash ledger balance exceeds threshold (default 25000 USD, High). T10-ALR-D5-01 [T10-RSK-D5] Denial backlog above threshold: Count of open denials for a client exceeds threshold (default 100 denials, High). T10-ALR-D5-02 [T10-RSK-D5] Denial aging beyond appeal window: Open denial with days_until_appeal_deadline at or below threshold (default 15 days, Critical). T10-ALR-D6-01 [T10-RSK-D6] Underpayment variance detected: Expected allowed amount minus paid amount exceeds tolerance (default 25 USD, High). T10-ALR-D7-01 [T10-RSK-D7] Credit balance aging: Credit balance open beyond threshold days (default 60 days, High). T10-ALR-D7-02 [T10-RSK-D7] Duplicate payment detected: Two or more payments matched to the same claim line (default 0 payments, High). T10-ALR-D8-01 [T10-RSK-D8] AR over 90 days above threshold: Percentage of total AR aged over 90 days exceeds threshold (default 15 percent, High). T10-ALR-D8-02 [T10-RSK-D8] AR trend deterioration: AR balance increases by more than threshold percent versus prior period (default 10 percent, High). T10-ALR-D8-03 [T10-RSK-D8] No-touch claim value above threshold: Aggregate value of claims with no action in N days exceeds threshold (default 50000 USD, High). T10-ALR-E1-01 [T10-RSK-E1] Credentialing application stuck: Days since application_date without payer response exceeds SLA (default 30 days, High). T10-ALR-E1-02 [T10-RSK-E1] Credentialing missing documents aging: Days a required document has been outstanding exceeds threshold (default 7 days, Medium). T10-ALR-E1-03 [T10-RSK-E1] Provider go-live at risk: Days until provider start_date at or below threshold with credentialing incomplete (default 30 days, Critical). T10-ALR-E2-01 [T10-RSK-E2] Revalidation or enrollment expiry approaching: Days until revalidation_due_date at or below any configured notice interval (default 180;120;90;60;30 days, Critical). T10-ALR-E3-01 [T10-RSK-E3] Provider status dashboard stale: Days since credentialing status last_update_date exceeds threshold (default 14 days, Low). T10-ALR-E4-01 [T10-RSK-E4] Claim provider data mismatches enrollment: Claim NPI, taxonomy, PTAN or location does not match the enrolled payer/provider record (default 0 claims, High). T10-ALR-E5-01 [T10-RSK-E5] Payer portal password expiring: Days until portal credential password_expiry at or below threshold (default 14 days, Medium). T10-ALR-E5-02 [T10-RSK-E5] Payer portal account locked or MFA failing: Portal account locked, or consecutive login failures exceeds threshold (default 3 attempts, Medium). T10-ALR-F1-01 [T10-RSK-F1] Fee schedule outdated: Days since fee schedule last_update_date exceeds threshold (default 180 days, High). T10-ALR-F1-02 [T10-RSK-F1] CPT missing from client fee plan: Billed CPT/HCPCS code has no rate in the active client fee plan (default 0 codes, Medium). T10-ALR-F2-01 [T10-RSK-F2] Payer contract renewal approaching: Days until contract expiry_date at or below any configured notice interval (default 120;90;60;30 days, High). T10-ALR-F2-02 [T10-RSK-F2] Payer rate variance after policy change: Contracted rate changes by more than threshold percent versus prior version (default 5 percent, High). T10-ALR-F3-01 [T10-RSK-F3] Manual adjustment above approval threshold: Manual adjustment amount exceeds the approval-matrix threshold without recorded approval (default 250 USD, High). T10-ALR-F3-02 [T10-RSK-F3] Unsupported adjustment reason code: Adjustment posted with a reason code not present in the approved adjustment mapping (default 0 adjustments, Medium). T10-ALR-F4-01 [T10-RSK-F4] Patient balance not statemented: Days since patient responsibility posted without a statement issued exceeds threshold (default 14 days, Medium). T10-ALR-F4-02 [T10-RSK-F4] Patient collection inactivity: Days since last collection action on an aged patient balance exceeds threshold (default 45 days, Medium). T10-ALR-G1-01 [T10-RSK-G1] EHR or PM system outage: System availability status = down, or downtime in a rolling window exceeds threshold (default 15 minutes, Critical). T10-ALR-G1-02 [T10-RSK-G1] Recovery target missed: Actual recovery time exceeds contracted RTO, or data loss exceeds RPO (default 240 minutes, Critical). T10-ALR-G2-01 [T10-RSK-G2] Interface sync failure: Consecutive failed EHR/PM synchronization jobs exceeds threshold (default 2 jobs, Critical). T10-ALR-G2-02 [T10-RSK-G2] Stale patient record in billing workflow: Hours since patient demographic record last synced exceeds threshold at time of billing (default 48 hours, High). T10-ALR-G3-01 [T10-RSK-G3] Allergy data missing or alerting disabled: Chart lacks allergy list completeness, or allergy alerting is disabled at the system level (default 0 charts, Critical). T10-ALR-G3-02 [T10-RSK-G3] Excessive allergy alert overrides: Override rate on allergy or interaction alerts exceeds threshold (default 20 percent, High). T10-ALR-G4-01 [T10-RSK-G4] Order or result routed to invalid destination: Order/result routing record has invalid address, or provider/location mismatch (default 0 orders, High). T10-ALR-G4-02 [T10-RSK-G4] Result unacknowledged beyond SLA: Hours since result delivery without provider acknowledgement exceeds SLA (default 72 hours, High). T10-ALR-G5-01 [T10-RSK-G5] Duplicate patient record detected: Two or more records match on demographic fingerprint above confidence threshold (default 90 percent, High). T10-ALR-G5-02 [T10-RSK-G5] Wrong-patient correction ticket raised: Correction ticket opened with category = wrong_patient (default 0 tickets, Critical). T10-ALR-G6-01 [T10-RSK-G6] System latency exceeds SLA: Average transaction response time over a rolling window exceeds threshold (default 3000 milliseconds, Medium). T10-ALR-G6-02 [T10-RSK-G6] User performance complaints rising: Count of performance-related complaints in a window exceeds threshold (default 5 complaints, Medium). T10-ALR-H1-01 [T10-RSK-H1] Endpoint compromise or suspicious file activity: EDR raises high-severity detection, or mass file-modification rate exceeds threshold (default 100 files_per_min, Critical). T10-ALR-H1-02 [T10-RSK-H1] Security tooling disabled: EDR, antivirus or logging agent reports disabled or non-reporting beyond threshold (default 4 hours, Critical). T10-ALR-H2-01 [T10-RSK-H2] User without MFA: Count of active accounts with mfa_enabled = false exceeds threshold (default 0 users, High). T10-ALR-H2-02 [T10-RSK-H2] Impossible travel detected: Successive logins from geographies implying travel speed above threshold (default 900 km_per_hour, High). T10-ALR-H2-03 [T10-RSK-H2] Brute-force attempt: Failed login attempts for an account in a rolling window exceeds threshold (default 10 attempts, High). T10-ALR-H3-01 [T10-RSK-H3] Redundancy missing on critical component: Critical infrastructure component has ha_status = single_node (default 0 components, High). T10-ALR-H3-02 [T10-RSK-H3] Failover test overdue: Days since last successful failover test exceeds threshold (default 180 days, Medium). T10-ALR-H4-01 [T10-RSK-H4] Backup job failure: Consecutive failed backup jobs exceeds threshold (default 1 jobs, Critical). T10-ALR-H4-02 [T10-RSK-H4] Restore test overdue: Days since last successful restore test exceeds threshold (default 90 days, Critical). T10-ALR-H4-03 [T10-RSK-H4] Immutable or offsite copy missing: Protected dataset has no immutable or offsite backup copy within RPO window (default 0 datasets, Critical). T10-ALR-H5-01 [T10-RSK-H5] Alternate site test overdue: Days since last alternate-site or remote-work continuity test exceeds threshold (default 180 days, High). T10-ALR-H5-02 [T10-RSK-H5] Remote work capacity shortfall: Percentage of critical staff lacking remote capability exceeds threshold (default 10 percent, High). T10-ALR-H6-01 [T10-RSK-H6] Subscription or certificate expiry approaching: Days until expiry_date at or below any configured notice interval (default 120;90;60;30;15;7 days, High). T10-ALR-H6-02 [T10-RSK-H6] Renewal unpaid inside final window: Days until expiry at or below final threshold with payment_status != paid (default 7 days, Critical). T10-ALR-H7-01 [T10-RSK-H7] Clearinghouse transaction failure spike: Transaction failure rate over a rolling window exceeds threshold (default 10 percent, High). T10-ALR-H7-02 [T10-RSK-H7] No acknowledgement received: Hours since last 277/999 acknowledgement for a submitted batch exceeds threshold (default 24 hours, High). T10-ALR-H8-01 [T10-RSK-H8] Unapproved deployment: Production deployment recorded without an approved change record (default 0 deployments, High). T10-ALR-H8-02 [T10-RSK-H8] Repeated hotfixes after release: Hotfix count within N days of a release exceeds threshold (default 2 hotfixes, Medium). T10-ALR-I1-01 [T10-RSK-I1] Attrition rate above threshold: Rolling 12-month attrition rate for a critical role exceeds threshold (default 15 percent, High). T10-ALR-I1-02 [T10-RSK-I1] Sustained overtime for critical resource: Weekly overtime hours for a critical-role employee exceeds threshold for N consecutive weeks (default 10 hours, High). T10-ALR-I2-01 [T10-RSK-I2] HR complaint unresolved beyond SLA: Days since complaint logged without resolution exceeds SLA (default 5 days, High). T10-ALR-I2-02 [T10-RSK-I2] Manager response time breach: Hours since HR complaint assignment without manager response exceeds threshold (default 48 hours, Medium). T10-ALR-I3-01 [T10-RSK-I3] Coder QA coverage below threshold: Percentage of a coder's claims sampled for QA in a period falls below threshold (default 5 percent, Medium). T10-ALR-I4-01 [T10-RSK-I4] Biller QA coverage below threshold: Percentage of a biller's claims sampled for QA in a period falls below threshold (default 5 percent, Medium). T10-ALR-I5-01 [T10-RSK-I5] Overdue follow-up queue per employee: Count of claims past next_action_date in an employee's worklist exceeds threshold (default 25 claims, Medium). T10-ALR-I6-01 [T10-RSK-I6] Posting lag per employee above threshold: Average business days between remit receipt and posting for an employee exceeds threshold (default 3 business_days, Medium). T10-ALR-I7-01 [T10-RSK-I7] Training overdue: Days past assigned training due_date exceeds threshold (default 14 days, Medium). T10-ALR-I7-02 [T10-RSK-I7] Work performed without required competency: Employee assigned work requiring a certification they do not hold or that has expired (default 0 assignments, High). T10-ALR-I8-01 [T10-RSK-I8] Critical process without backup owner: Process flagged critical has no backup_owner or no current SOP (default 0 processes, High). T10-ALR-J1-01 [T10-RSK-J1] Complaint overdue by severity: Hours since complaint logged without resolution exceeds the severity-specific SLA (default 72 hours, Critical). T10-ALR-J1-02 [T10-RSK-J1] Complaint without owner: Hours since complaint logged without an assigned owner exceeds threshold (default 4 hours, High). T10-ALR-J1-03 [T10-RSK-J1] Repeated complaint theme: Same complaint category recurs for a client more than N times in a rolling window (default 3 complaints, High). T10-ALR-J2-01 [T10-RSK-J2] Client invoice due: Days until invoice generation due_date at or below threshold (default 5 days, Medium). T10-ALR-J2-02 [T10-RSK-J2] Client invoice missed: Invoice generation due_date passed without invoice_status = generated (default 0 invoices, High). T10-ALR-J3-01 [T10-RSK-J3] Client report data stale: Hours since report data last_refresh exceeds threshold at time of delivery (default 24 hours, High). T10-ALR-J3-02 [T10-RSK-J3] Report reconciliation variance: Variance between report totals and source-of-truth ledger exceeds tolerance (default 0.5 percent, High). T10-ALR-J4-01 [T10-RSK-J4] SLA breach imminent: Percentage of the SLA window consumed for an in-flight item exceeds threshold (default 80 percent, High). T10-ALR-J4-02 [T10-RSK-J4] SLA breach rate above threshold: Percentage of items breaching SLA in a period exceeds threshold (default 5 percent, High). T10-ALR-J5-01 [T10-RSK-J5] Onboarding task incomplete before go-live: Days until client go_live_date at or below threshold with open onboarding checklist items (default 14 days, Medium). T10-ALR-K1-01 [T10-RSK-K1] Clearinghouse outage: Clearinghouse status = down, or downtime in a rolling window exceeds threshold (default 30 minutes, High). T10-ALR-K1-02 [T10-RSK-K1] No alternative submission route configured: Client or payer has no configured secondary clearinghouse or direct submission route (default 0 routes, Medium). T10-ALR-K2-01 [T10-RSK-K2] Vendor SLA breach: Hours since vendor ticket raised without response exceeds the contracted SLA (default 24 hours, Medium). T10-ALR-K2-02 [T10-RSK-K2] Repeated unresolved vendor incidents: Count of unresolved vendor incidents in a rolling window exceeds threshold (default 3 incidents, Medium). T10-ALR-K3-01 [T10-RSK-K3] Vendor contract expiry approaching: Days until vendor contract or subscription expiry at or below any configured notice interval (default 90;60;30;15 days, High). T10-ALR-K3-02 [T10-RSK-K3] Renewal owner unassigned: Contract inside its renewal notice window with no renewal_owner assigned (default 0 contracts, Medium). T10-ALR-K4-01 [T10-RSK-K4] Vendor security evidence missing or expired: PHI-access vendor has no SOC report, or SOC report age exceeds threshold (default 395 days, High). T10-ALR-K4-02 [T10-RSK-K4] Unresolved vendor security finding: Open vendor security finding past its remediation due_date (default 30 days, High). T10-ALR-K5-01 [T10-RSK-K5] Offshore PHI access without client approval: Offshore user with PHI access lacks a recorded client approval for that client (default 0 users, Critical). T10-ALR-K5-02 [T10-RSK-K5] Offshore contractual safeguard missing: Offshore entity lacks a current BAA, subcontractor agreement or flow-down terms (default 0 entities, Critical). T10-ALR-L1-01 [T10-RSK-L1] Risk without owner: Register entry has no assigned risk_owner (default 0 risks, High). T10-ALR-L1-02 [T10-RSK-L1] Mitigation overdue: Days past mitigation due_date exceeds threshold (default 7 days, High). T10-ALR-L2-01 [T10-RSK-L2] Risk unscored or score stale: Register entry has no severity/likelihood, or days since last_scored_date exceeds threshold (default 90 days, Medium). T10-ALR-L3-01 [T10-RSK-L3] Required audit evidence missing: Control with evidence_required = true has no linked evidence artifact for the period (default 0 controls, High). T10-ALR-L3-02 [T10-RSK-L3] Audit artifact expired: Days since evidence artifact captured exceeds its validity period (default 365 days, Medium). T10-ALR-L4-01 [T10-RSK-L4] SOP review overdue: Days since SOP last_review_date exceeds threshold (default 365 days, Medium). T10-ALR-L4-02 [T10-RSK-L4] SOP acknowledgement outstanding: Days since SOP version published without employee attestation exceeds threshold (default 30 days, Medium). T10-ALR-L5-01 [T10-RSK-L5] Critical alert unacknowledged: Hours since a Critical alert fired without acknowledgement exceeds threshold (default 4 hours, Critical). T10-ALR-L5-02 [T10-RSK-L5] Alert closure rate below threshold: Percentage of alerts closed within their escalation window falls below threshold (default 90 percent, High).

knowledgeAssets.title: Tenant-10 PHI Field Inventory (HIPAA)
knowledgeAssets.summary: The PHI-flagged fields in the T10 data model; these drive the masked-field / audit-logged reveal pattern (UI Phase 1 s2.4) and the RegulatedDataProfile.
